response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and a craftsmanship mindset, but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core requirements of this role. There is no demonstrated depth in Java, Kotlin, JVM internals, or the Spring ecosystem, and no evidence of IDE/language-tooling work beyond a brief C/C++ stint on LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. The role demands deep JVM and enterprise-Java expertise that this profile does not substantiate.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Brief prior experience contributing to an IDE product (LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments)
Proven ability to work across complex systems and polyglot stacks
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Java listed as a skill but no substantial Java/Kotlin/JVM project history
Career focus is web/Node/DLang rather than JVM tooling or language internals
